overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit waterfront district in Night City. The player moves past digital billboards, crowds of NPCs, and outdoor cafes with towering glass skyscrapers in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial waterfront promenade with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial promenade past benches and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: person sitting on yellow bench near the billboard

entered.detail: tall curved glass building with reflective teal windows
tall rectangular glass tower with grid pattern
wooden railed walkway with cyan neon strip underneath
illuminated advertisement with face and BLIV text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic commercial promenade with towering glass skyscrapers in the background. The player walks past digital billboards and yellow benches while palm trees line the walkway. The area features neon lighting accents under an elevated pedestrian bridge.

events.description: moving from covered commercial area to open waterfront with water view

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with water visible to the right

entered.detail: calm waterway running alongside the pedestrian path
silver metal safety railing along the water edge
multi-level highway overpass structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide waterfront walkway with a canal visible on the right side. The camera moves along the water past metal railings, with elevated highway structures visible in the distance. The lighting becomes more direct and natural as the enclosed commercial area is left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded pedestrian plaza with large advertisements

events.description: entering a densely populated plaza area with groups of NPCs

agents.ego_description: moving through a crowded plaza area with groups of NPCs socializing and dancing near large advertisements

person sitting on bench in front of large billboard

entered.detail: large red advertisement with figure and ZEIG DICH text
yellow billboard with clown character and ALL FOODS text
building facade with purple neon lighting and entrance

segments.scene_description: The player enters a crowded plaza filled with NPCs, some dancing in groups. Large digital billboards dominate the left side, including a prominent red advertisement and a yellow All Foods billboard. The area feels more enclosed as the water is left behind and commercial buildings surround the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cafe seating area with neon-lit buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the tall glass skyscrapers against the sky

agents.ego_description: looking up at the towering glass skyscrapers, then proceeding past an outdoor cafe with purple neon lighting

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor cafe table under umbrella

entered.detail: outdoor dining area with NICOLA signage and tables
large white patio umbrella shading outdoor seating
teal and yellow automated vending machine

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to admire the massive glass skyscrapers towering overhead, then descends to show an outdoor cafe with white umbrellas and NICOLA branding. The area features purple neon lighting on building facades and sparse pedestrian activity with some patrons seated at tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway approaching underpass beneath elevated highway

events.description: approaching covered underpass entrance with stairs leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking past the outdoor cafe seating and approaching an underpass beneath the elevated highway

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance leading under the elevated highway
concrete steps leading up to the elevated walkway
building with orange facade and geometric design

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player moving past the cafe area toward a darker underpass entrance beneath the elevated highway. The surroundings become more enclosed with an orange commercial building on the left and concrete stairs leading upward, while the massive glass towers recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, neon-accented commercial promenade toward a shadowed urban underpass. It begins by moving past digital billboards and palm trees beneath an elevated pedestrian bridge, before the space opens up into a wide waterfront walkway where the lighting becomes more natural beside a canal and distant highway structures. As the camera leaves the water behind, the scene shifts into a crowded, enclosed plaza dominated by massive red and yellow advertisements and groups of dancing NPCs. The perspective then tilts upward to admire towering glass skyscrapers before descending toward an outdoor cafe with white umbrellas and purple neon facades. Finally, the camera moves past the cafe and toward a darker underpass entrance, with the massive towers receding as the environment closes in around an orange commercial building and concrete stairs.
